name: Club Cheesecake with Zwieback Crumb Crust
recipeInstructions:
- Crush zwieback and roll to fine crumbs. Combine half of the crumbs with 1/2 cup sugar, 1/8 teaspoon salt, and melted butter until well blended.
- Press the mixture onto the bottom and sides of a 9-inch cake pan with removable bottom. Reserve the remaining crumbs for the top of the cake.
- Cover the crust with waxed paper and chill.
To make filling:
1. Combine 1 cup sugar and whipping cream (or evaporated milk) in a bowl, stirring until the sugar is dissolved.
2. Add cottage cheese, 1/8 teaspoon salt, well-beaten egg yolks, sifted flour, vanilla extract, and grated lemon peel to the sugar mixture. Stir thoroughly until well blended and smooth.
3. Beat egg whites until stiff and fold into the cheese mixture.
4. Turn the batter onto the chilled Zwieback Crumb Crust and sprinkle with reserved crumbs.
5. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 20 minutes. Let the cake cool in the pan.
